case_title: AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY VS. CHIP ISACC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ISACC, CHIP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $550.00 FILED BY AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ISACC, CHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100) SERVED JUN-17-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ISACC, CHIP
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PANFILO ARMAS--FOREMAN.NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
